dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Close above SMA20 confirms strong uptrend; (2) Body smaller than ATR14 identifies tiny red candle at top of previous green candle; (3) Close crosses above previous high represents confirmation breakout. Exit when price closes below SMA20, indicating trend reversal. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days given pattern is short-term continuation setup.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) Close above SMA20 confirms strong uptrend; (2) Body smaller than ATR14 identifies tiny red candle at top of previous green candle; (3) Close crosses above previous high represents confirmation breakout. Exit when price closes below SMA20, indicating trend reversal. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days given pattern is short-term continuation setup.

source_rule_text: Enter a long position in an uptrend when a small red candle forms near the top of the previous green candle, and a subsequent candle breaks above the high of that small red candle.
